ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., genetic algorithm, simulated annealing) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, paused) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size used in the experiment */,
  "generations" INTEGER /* Number of generations run in the experiment */,
  "mutation_rate" REAL /* Mutation rate used in the experiment */,
  "crossover_rate" REAL /* Crossover rate used in the experiment */,
  "selection_method" TEXT /* Selection method used (e.g., tournament, roulette wheel) */,
  "initial_population_method" TEXT /* Method used to generate the initial population */,
  "termination_condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the experiment terminates (e.g., max generations, fitness threshold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation number */,
  "feasible_individuals" INTEGER /* Number of feasible individuals in the generation */,
  "fittest_individual_fitness" REAL /* Fitness value of the fittest individual in the generation */,
  "average_fitness" REAL /* Average fitness value of the population in the generation */,
  "diversity_index" REAL /* Measure of the diversity of the population */,
  "convergence_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the population converges to the optimal solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connected_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connected component */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation number */,
  "component_size" INTEGER /* Size of the connected component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of connected component (e.g., strongly connected, weakly connected) */,
  "component_score" REAL /* Score or metric associated with the connected component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connected_components_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_experiments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level the user has for the experiment (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "generation_number" INTEGER /* Generation number */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the generation started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the generation ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the generation in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_generations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feasible_individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feasible individual */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation */,
  "fitness" REAL /* Fitness value of the individual */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the feasible individual */,
  "phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype of the feasible individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feasible_individuals_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES experiment_generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feasible_individuals_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fittest_individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fittest individual */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation */,
  "fitness" REAL /* Fitness value of the individual */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the fittest individual */,
  "phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype of the fittest individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fittest_individuals_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES experiment_generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fittest_individuals_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "first_feasible_individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each first feasible individual */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation */,
  "fitness" REAL /* Fitness value of the individual */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the first feasible individual */,
  "phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype of the first feasible individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_first_feasible_individuals_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES experiment_generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_first_feasible_individuals_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generation_of_fittest_individual" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation of fittest individual */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation */,
  "fitness" REAL /* Fitness value of the individual */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the fittest individual in the generation */,
  "phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype of the fittest individual in the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_of_fittest_individual_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_of_fittest_individual_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES experiment_generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generation_of_first_feasible_individual" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation of first feasible individual */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation */,
  "fitness" REAL /* Fitness value of the individual */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the first feasible individual in the generation */,
  "phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype of the first feasible individual in the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_of_first_feasible_individual_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_of_first_feasible_individual_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES experiment_generations ("generation_id")
)
